name: atlas-write-spike

frontmatter.name: atlas-write-spike
frontmatter.description: Crystallize a recent conversation insight into a structured experience atom JSON for CCL Atlas. Trigger when user says "沉进去", "沉淀一下", "记一笔", "sink this in", or explicitly asks to preserve a coding/methodology/decision insight from the current session. This is a spike skill for CCL Atlas V1.5 Gap-2 feasibility validation.
